name: FLORENTINE GROTESCHI #3
description: Florentine Groteschi #3 is a toxic emerald tabloid single-panel relic built around DaVinci and Bootleg Museum Giftshop. Tarocchi Fiorentini assigns Fuoco, used here as the witness card. A fresco giornata seam hiding workshop gossip gets pulled into a CAPTCHA grid asking which saints are traffic lights, making the panel read like a corrupted receipt for belief, status, and patronage. The small evidence marks become witnesses, not gimmicks. The generated insert, a hand-drawn liquidity puddle reflecting the Duomo, acts as the modern clue; Gematria marks CODEX at Σ 306.

attributes.value: a hand-drawn liquidity puddle reflecting the Duomo

florentine_groteschi.collector_note: Custom top-level lore data: not an OpenSea trait list, but intentionally readable in the raw token JSON.

chess_piece.name: Pawn

rarity.ranking_rule: Higher chess strength/rank is intentionally rarer: Pawn common, Knight/Bishop uncommon, Rook rare, Queen epic, King legendary.

board_position.position_rule: Deterministic per-token board square reserved for future game/use mechanics; independent of visible glyph placement.

chess_piece.allocation_rule: Weighted deterministic shuffled chess allocation by piece strength: {'Pawn': 560, 'Knight': 280, 'Bishop': 280, 'Rook': 168, 'Queen': 84, 'King': 29}
chess_piece.metadata_visibility: Hidden from OpenSea attributes; stored only in florentine_groteschi.hidden_traits.
chess_piece.visual_rule: A small unlabeled foreground chess glyph shows the chess-piece graphic with the piece name encoded underneath; that visible code is intentionally not serialized in metadata.

visible_text.title: FLORENTINE GROTESCHI #3
visible_text.main_caption: Old money meets new money and immediately asks for receipts. DaVinci is not random dressing here: the Fuoco motif turns the whole panel into a little court exhibit, so the small evidence marks become witnesses, not gimmicks.
visible_text.history_now_bridge: NOTARY CASE: a fresco giornata seam hiding workshop gossip gets pulled into a CAPTCHA grid asking which saints are traffic lights. Fuoco reads the jump as patronage theater: who certifies the relic, who pays for belief, and who gets the receipt. The small evidence marks become witnesses, not gimmicks.
visible_text.period_looksmaxx_plaque: DAVINCI NOTEBOOKMAXX MIRROR NOTE: assign Mars to the nose bridge before the guild says no cap. The notary calls it a cooked miracle, kept short for plaque survival.
visible_text.qr_payload_if_drawn: ORACLE #3: Fuoco watches DaVinci; the small evidence marks become witnesses, not gimmicks.

artwork_breakdown.generated_insert: a hand-drawn liquidity puddle reflecting the Duomo

tarocchi_fiorentini.allocation_rule: 14 complete 97-card sets across 1,401 tokens, plus 43 deterministic extras

artwork_breakdown.composition_read: DaVinci anchors the historical source. Fuoco supplies the witness logic. The hand-drawn liquidity puddle reflecting the Duomo acts as the modern meme-object. The toxic emerald tabloid palette and Bootleg Museum Giftshop styling make the panel read like a corrupted Renaissance case file.

groteschi_explanation.plain_english: Read plainly: DaVinci is treated as evidence in a notary case. The old-world clue is a fresco giornata seam hiding workshop gossip; the modern-world echo is a CAPTCHA grid asking which saints are traffic lights. The joke is that patronage, holy paperwork, and marketplace verification are all status systems asking who gets believed.
groteschi_explanation.read_between_the_lines: The Fuoco card is not decorative; it tells you how to read the room. The old clue and the modern clue compete as evidence, so the panel becomes a custody argument about belief, status, and receipts. The small evidence marks become witnesses, not gimmicks. The slang turns sacred authority into aura, patronage into clout economics, and marginalia into groupchat evidence.

slang_for_normal_plebs.translation_for_normal_plebs: did it perfectly; in this collection a fresco, saint, or relic can 'eat' like a viral post

hidden_solution.method: Split the visible marker into DNA triplets, translate each triplet through the genetic-code table, then read the amino-acid letters as the source Base name. Non-standard letters use documented stop/nearest triplet placeholders.

hidden_acrostic.method: Read the first character of each acrostic line; slashes are spaces.

collector_warnings: If the ledger balances, something has gone terribly wrong.
Fuoco is a witness, not a decorative rectangle.
Opening the metadata counts as participation in the trial.
Do not let the codon marker breed near the provenance strip.
This file has already been read by one Medici accountant.
